data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences $112 Million Liquidation
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market faced liquidations totaling $112 million over the past 12 hours. Long positions accounted for $64.65 million of the liquidations, while short positions amounted to $47.82 million.

data.title: BitMart launches CreatorBid(BID)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch CreatorBid (BID) at 20:00 (Eastern Time) on March 20, and the BID/USDT trading pair will be opened.
CreatorBid is the center of the AI ​​Creator Economy, where anyone can start, develop and get rewards through AI Agents.

data.title: Nillion announces NIL token economics, initial circulation of 195.15 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement of Binance, Nillion announced the NIL token economics. The total supply of NIL tokens is 1 billion, and the maximum supply of NIL tokens is unlimited (depending on the release type and autonomous governance, the annual inflation rate is 1%). The initial circulation is 195.15 million (19.52% of the total token supply).

data.title: Justin Sun Announces TRON Integration On Solana Blockchain, Increasing Access to TRX, DeFi, and NFT
data.description:
Justin Sun, founder of TRON, announced that the token TRX will be available on the Solana blockchain. This announcement boosted TRON’s price by 8%, with investors and traders expecting higher transaction speeds and utility between the two major cryptocurrencies. “TRX will be soon on Solana. Ready to buy and collaborate”, wrote Sun on X. Sun […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/justin-sun-announces-tron-integration-on-solana-blockchain-increasing-access-to-trx-defi-and-nft/

data.title: BID rose above 0.098USDT, with the largest increase since listing on LBank reaching 253%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LBank market shows that BID rose above 0.098USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.0989USDT, and is now quoted at 0.09USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 221%. Since the launch of LBank, the current maximum increase has reached 253%, and the current market value is approximately US$23.3 million.

data.title: Gate.io will launch BROCCOLIF3B and BR perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will launch BROCCOLIF3B and BR perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) at 21:00 (UTC+8) on March 20, 2025, supporting 1-50 times leverage.

data.title: AscendEX will launch Be For FWX (B4FWX)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch Be For FWX (B4FWX) for the first time at 10:00 on March 21, opening the B4FWX/USDT trading pair, and recharge is now open.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is the first and most comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin on the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first listing rate is as high as 80%.
